pr.title: RHOAIENG-62583: AutoML & AutoRAG UI: Reconfiguring an experiment shows message to user for selecting an S3 connection while a connection has already been selected
pr.body:
When reconfiguring an experiment with a pre-selected S3 connection, the
empty state message incorrectly prompted users to "Select an S3
connection" even though one was already selected. Updated the title to
"Select a file from your S3 connection or upload a file to get started"
and the body to "select a file or upload one in the widget on the left"
to accurately reflect the required user action. Also fixed pre-existing
lint issues (prettier formatting, eslint suppression) in the touched files.

Closes [RHOAIENG-62583](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-62583)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Nikhil Sharma <nikhisha@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Style**
  * Clarified empty-state messaging in AutoML and AutoRag configuration screens — now instructs users to select a file from their S3 connection or upload a file to get started.

* **Tests**
  * Updated test assertions across initial, invalid-selection, and cleared-selection flows to match the revised UI messaging.
<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
